"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); const utils = require("../../utils"); class ErrorFilter { constructor(_settings) { this._settings = _settings; } getFilter() { return (error) => this._isNonFatalError(error); } _isNonFatalError(error) { return utils.errno.isEnoentCodeError(error) || this._settings.suppressErrors; } } exports.default = ErrorFilter;
